mission_title: Repair Bay V1.3 — Launcher Index and Unknown Resolution

argv: from pathlib import Path;files=[Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py'),Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\repair_bay_diagnostics.py'),Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\VERIFY_REPAIR_BAY_V1.py')];[compile(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'),str(p),'exec') for p in files];print('REPAIR_BAY_V1_3_SOURCE_COMPILE_OK')

argv: import json,sys;sys.path.insert(0,r'Z:\FOXAI');from core.repair_bay_diagnostics import run_launcher_index;r=run_launcher_index(r'Z:\FOXAI',context={'validation':'v1_3_live_launcher_index_smoke'});s=r.get('safety') or {};i=r.get('inventory') or {};items=i.get('items') or [];summary=r.get('summary') or {};assert r.get('version')=='1.3',r.get('version');assert r.get('read_only') is True,r;assert s.get('batch_files_executed') is False,s;assert s.get('network_used') is False,s;assert s.get('commands_run') is False,s;assert int(s.get('files_written') or 0)==0,s;assert int(s.get('moves') or 0)==0,s;assert int(s.get('renames') or 0)==0,s;assert int(s.get('deletions') or 0)==0,s;assert int(s.get('repairs_applied') or 0)==0,s;assert len(items)==int(summary.get('total') or 0),(len(items),summary);assert all('purpose_confidence' in item and 'resolution_state' in item and 'search_text' in item for item in items);front=i.get('approved_front_doors') or {};root_front={item.get('name'):item for item in (front.get('root') or [])};assert root_front.get('START_FOXAI_WEB_WITH_COMFYUI.bat',{}).get('present'),root_front;assert root_front.get('START_FOXAI_DESKTOP_TWO_WINDOW_RECOVERY.bat',{}).get('present'),root_front;external=front.get('external') or [];assert any(item.get('present') and 'START_KAYOCKS_STUDY.bat' in str(item.get('path')) for item in external),external;protected={item.get('name') for item in ((i.get('protected_baseline') or {}).get('root') or [])};candidates={item.get('name') for item in (i.get('obsolete_looking_candidates') or [])};assert not protected.intersection(candidates),(protected,candidates);archive=i.get('archive_plan') or {};assert archive.get('status')=='proposal_only',archive;assert int(archive.get('changes_applied') or 0)==0,archive;print(json.dumps({'REPAIR_BAY_V1_3_LIVE_OK':True,'total':summary.get('total'),'protected':summary.get('protected'),'front_doors':summary.get('approved_front_doors'),'resolved':summary.get('resolved'),'unresolved':summary.get('unresolved'),'relationships':summary.get('relationships'),'duplicates':summary.get('exact_duplicate_groups')},indent=2))
